message:
✨ Show per-run container images in nightly E2E dot tooltips (#1696)

Fetch image metadata artifacts (emitted by llm-d-infra PR #78) from
GitHub Actions and attach resolved container image tags to each
individual run. Dot tooltips now show the actual images used for that
specific run instead of guide-level defaults.

Changes:
- Add fflate dependency for zip decompression of GitHub artifacts
- Netlify function: fetch and cache per-repo image-metadata artifacts,
  enrich each NightlyRun with llmdImages/otherImages
- NightlyRun interface: add optional llmdImages and otherImages fields
- Card component: prefer run.llmdImages over guide.llmdImages
- Hook: pass through per-run image fields from API response
- Widget code generator: use r.llmdImages || g.llmdImages fallback
  for dot tooltips with rich image detail

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -195,8 +195,9 @@ Please provide:
     })
   }, [guide, run, checkKeyAndRun, startMission])
 
-  const llmdImages = guide?.llmdImages
-  const otherImages = guide?.otherImages
+  // Prefer per-run images (from workflow artifact) over guide-level fallback
+  const llmdImages = run.llmdImages ?? guide?.llmdImages
+  const otherImages = run.otherImages ?? guide?.otherImages
   const hasLLMDImages = llmdImages && Object.keys(llmdImages).length > 0
   const hasOtherImages = otherImages && Object.keys(otherImages).length > 0
